name: pollinations-ai
title: Pollinations AI
description: Chat with AI models powered by Pollinations.ai — free tier available, connect with GitHub for more models
author: mhmtranas

commands.name: chat
commands.title: Chat with AI
commands.description: Start a conversation with Pollinations AI

commands.name: quick-ask
commands.title: Quick Ask
commands.description: Ask a one-shot question and get an instant answer

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar
commands.description: Correct grammar and spelling in any language without changing the meaning

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.description: Translate text into any language using AI

commands.name: connect
commands.title: Connect to Pollinations
commands.description: Sign in with GitHub to get your free pollen balance

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'npm run build' && npm run build
